'''sangara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yabbo|yabbo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yabbo|yabbo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sangara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sængæræth|sængæræth]] || [[word:sængæræj|sængæræj]] || [[word:sængæræsh|sængæræsh]] || [[word:sængæræ|sængæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sangangarath|sangangarath]] || [[word:sangangaraj|sangangaraj]] || [[word:sangangarash|sangangarash]] || [[word:sangangara|sangangara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sangarath|sangarath]] || [[word:sangaraj|sangaraj]] || [[word:sangarash|sangarash]] || [[word:sangara|sangara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sangafrath|sangafrath]] || [[word:sangafraj|sangafraj]] || [[word:sangafrash|sangafrash]] || [[word:sangafraf|sangafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sangaratha|sangaratha]] || [[word:sangaraja|sangaraja]] || [[word:sangarasha|sangarasha]] || [[word:sangaraka|sangaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sangarath|sangarath]] || [[word:sangaraj|sangaraj]] || [[word:sangarash|sangarash]] || [[word:sangara|sangara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sangarathal|sangarathal]] || [[word:sangarajal|sangarajal]] || [[word:sangarashal|sangarashal]] || [[word:sangarakal|sangarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sangarathatha|sangarathatha]] || [[word:sangarajaja|sangarajaja]] || [[word:sangarashasha|sangarashasha]] || [[word:sangaraka|sangaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sangarathan|sangarathan]] || [[word:sangarajan|sangarajan]] || [[word:sangarashan|sangarashan]] || [[word:sangarakan|sangarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sangarathaoro|sangarathaoro]] || [[word:sangarajaoro|sangarajaoro]] || [[word:sangarashaoro|sangarashaoro]] || [[word:sangarakaoro|sangarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
